name: Maganin Ringer's Magani (LR)
description: Daidaitaccen ruwan isotonic crystalloid. An fi so fiye da salin na al'ada don farfadowar rauni mai girma -- ƙarin daidaiton ilimin lissafi, ƙarancin haɗarin hyperchloremic acidosis. Ya ƙunshi sodium, potassium, calcium, lactate.
indications: Resuscitation na rauni (wanda aka fi so crystalloid a cikin girgizar jini)
dose: Hemorrhagic shock: Iyakance zuwa 1L max kafin canzawa zuwa samfuran jini. Maƙasudin SBP 80-90 mmHg shiga rauni, 90 mmHg TBI. Burns (Parkland): 4 mL x kg x % TBSA ya ƙone sama da awa 24 (rabi a farkon 8h).
contraindications: Rashin gazawar hanta mai tsanani (rauni na lactate metabolism - dangi)
warnings: Har yanzu crystalloid -- ba zai iya ɗaukar iskar oxygen ba. Samfuran jini sun fi girma ga bugun jini. LR gada ce kawai.
Kada a haxa da samfuran jini a layi ɗaya (calcium yana haifar da clotting).
KAR a wuce gona da iri wajen farfado da rauni a cikin rauni kafin sarrafa zubar jini.

pediatric.dose: 20 ml/kg bolus, sake tantancewa. An fi so fiye da NS don raunin yara.

obstetric.note: Ruwan da aka fi so a cikin naƙuda da haihuwa. Dace don farfado da zubar jinin haihuwa.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS / ABA Burn Guidelines
